examples: That night was the first time I heard about him catching the carp.
Benson was a normal-size carp when she was placed in the Kingfisher Lake 16 years ago.
It was because he was of an argumentative mind that in their cabin at night he permitted himself to carp.
The popularity of carp in China has led to overfishing and a dwindling supply.
The swelling Mississippi overtook the ponds, and the carp, native to Chinese rivers like the Yangtze, escaped.
